title: Damp Daggers
description: Adds daggers to Minecraft which costs half of everything!
body:
Adds daggers to Minecraft, simple recipes. Halfs the cost and does half the damage with double the attack speed.

Recipes:

**Half Stick**
Put a stick in any crafting grid and get 2 half sticks
**Wooden Dagger**
A half stick beneath any plank
**Stone Dagger**
A half stick beneath **cobblestone**
**Iron Dagger**
A half stick beneath iron ingot
**Diamond Dagger**
A half stick beneath diamond
**Netherite Dagger**
Put netherite ingot in smithing table with a Diamond Dagger, **_NO SMITHING TEMPLATE REQUIRED_**
